summary: Add a safe default real-agent build and deep critic path
description: Add a safe default real-agent build and deep critic path
acceptance: Agent-mode tasks select an available Codex or Hermes adapter without unsafe bypass flags
Mechanical tasks can explicitly opt out of model execution
A deep critic returns a machine-readable blocking or passing verdict before finish

evidence.summary: 38 smoke tests pass; make check passes; agent-mode tasks safely select Codex/Hermes, mechanical mode opts out, deep critic BLOCK triggers repair and PASS is required, and prompt artifacts retain vision/principles.
